pattern.imageEvidence: fabric-safe cleaning process in a real room
pattern.styleContract: Soft domestic calm with fabric-safe extraction proof, a visible upholstery cleaning moment, teal proof accents, and a fabric care note as the signature move.

tagline: Sofas, rugs, and carpets reset without the mystery damp smell.

hero.title: FreshThread carpet and upholstery cleaning hero image
hero.alt: A fabric cleaning technician using an extractor wand on a light sofa and nearby area rug in a bright living room.

contact.serviceArea: Sofas, sectionals, area rugs, stairs, bedrooms, and favorite living room paths across the east metro and nearby suburbs

copy.eyebrow: Carpet and upholstery cleaning with calm chemistry
copy.heroTitle: Make the soft stuff feel fresh again.
copy.heroText: FreshThread cleans sofas, rugs, stairs, and carpets with fabric-smart extraction, tidy setup, and drying notes that keep the room usable instead of mysterious.
copy.introTitle: Stains have stories. We prefer endings.
copy.introText: We match the cleaner, dwell time, and extraction pass to the fiber so spots lift without over-wetting the cushion or rug.
copy.quoteTitle: Ready for fabric that feels less lived-in?
copy.quoteText: Send room photos, fabric type if you know it, stain close-ups, and the best day to clean. We will reply with the right method, timing, and a clear estimate.

services.title: Sofas and sectionals
services.text: Cushions, arms, backs, and favorite seats cleaned with fabric-safe extraction and careful moisture control.

services.title: Carpets and stairs
services.text: Traffic lanes, bedroom carpets, stairs, and landings refreshed with pre-treatment where the path gets obvious.

services.title: Area rugs and spots
services.text: Small rugs, coffee marks, pet-adjacent accidents, and mystery spots tested before we promise miracles.

process.title: Fiber check
process.text: We identify fabric type, colorfastness, soil level, and any stain that needs a gentler conversation.

process.title: Pre-treat and extract
process.text: Cleaner, dwell time, agitation, and extraction are matched to the surface instead of blasted at everything.

process.title: Drying notes
process.text: We groom fibers, set airflow advice, and leave simple timing so cushions and rugs come back politely.

proof.label: methods matched to upholstery, rugs, and carpet fibers
extraction passes that avoid the swampy sofa problem
clear drying notes before the furniture goes back to work

notes: Works: a fabric care note. gives the page a memorable shape.
